tagline: Long Island's Trusted Environmental & Plumbing Experts Since 1950

hero.headline: Protect Your Property From Day One
hero.subheadline: For 76 years, Long Island families have trusted Clear River Environmental to handle their toughest plumbing, septic, and environmental emergencies. We arrive within 2 hours, fix it right, and never surprise you with hidden fees.
checkmarks: Written Estimates Before Work Begins - No Surprise Bills

services.headline: Complete Environmental & Plumbing Solutions
services.subtitle: From a leaking faucet to a hazardous waste emergency, our licensed technicians handle it all across Suffolk and Nassau Counties.

items.title: Plumbing Services
items.description: Emergency repairs, water heater installation, sump pumps, gas lines, oil tanks, winterization, slab leak repair, backflow certification, and frozen pipe repair for homes and businesses.

items.title: Sewer & Drain Services
items.description: Sewer line cleaning, high-pressure water jetting, video camera inspection, and storm drain cleaning to keep your drainage systems flowing without interruption.

items.title: Cesspool Services
items.description: Cesspool pumping, location services, aeration, chemical and bacterial treatment, system inspection, and certifications for Long Island residential and commercial properties.

items.title: Septic System Services
items.description: Complete septic system repair, maintenance, tank pumping, new installation, and thorough inspections so your system runs trouble-free for years.

items.title: Environmental Remediation
items.description: Hazardous and non-hazardous waste remediation, oil tank cleaning, emergency oil spill response, and bulk liquid waste hauling by licensed environmental technicians.

items.title: Commercial & Municipal
items.description: Compliant cesspool, septic, and plumbing solutions for businesses and government facilities, including emergency services and regulatory paperwork handling.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Reach us 24/7 at (631) 467-5447 or fill out our form. We will ask a few questions about your situation and schedule a visit at your convenience.

steps.title: On-Site Diagnosis & Written Estimate
steps.description: A licensed technician arrives promptly, inspects the issue using camera systems and GPS locators, and gives you a written estimate before any work begins.

steps.title: Expert Repair & Guaranteed Results
steps.description: We complete the work efficiently with modern equipment, handle all health department paperwork, and leave your property as clean as we found it.

about.label: About Clear River Environmental
about.headline: Three Generations of Environmental Expertise on Long Island
about.description: Since 1950, the Clear River family has been solving Long Island's toughest environmental and plumbing challenges. What started as a small cesspool pumping operation in Bohemia has grown into a full-service environmental remediation company with a fleet of modern equipment and a team of licensed technicians. We treat every property like it is our own, providing honest assessments, upfront pricing, and the kind of care that has earned us 168 five-star reviews from our neighbors.

features.title: CRA, EAA, EPA & IICRC Certified
features.description: Every technician on our team carries industry-recognized certifications and undergoes ongoing training in the latest environmental safety protocols.

features.title: Camera & GPS Location Technology
features.description: We use video camera inspection systems and GPS locators to diagnose problems accurately before digging, saving you time and money.

features.title: Full Paperwork Handling
features.description: We manage all health department paperwork, code compliance documentation, and permit applications so you never have to deal with the bureaucracy.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, Zero Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every job starts with a detailed written estimate. You approve the price before we turn a single wrench. No hidden fees, no after-the-fact add-ons.

guarantee.headline: Our 2-Hour Emergency Promise
guarantee.description: When sewage is backing up or a pipe bursts at 2 AM, you cannot wait until morning. Call us and a licensed technician will be at your door within 2 hours, any day of the year. If we are ever late, your service call fee is waived. That is the Clear River guarantee.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We guarantee a licensed technician at your property within 2 hours of your call, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. We have crews stationed throughout Suffolk and Nassau Counties for the fastest possible response.

faqs.question: Do you provide written estimates before starting work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every job begins with an on-site inspection and a written estimate that you approve before we start. The price you agree to is the price you pay, period. No hidden fees or surprise charges.

faqs.question: What areas of Long Island do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Suffolk County and Nassau County, including Bohemia, Ronkonkoma, Islip, Smithtown, Huntington, Babylon, and surrounding communities. If you are on Long Island, we can help.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our technicians hold certifications from the CRA, EAA, EPA, and IICRC. They are licensed environmental service professionals with ongoing training in the latest equipment and safety protocols.

faqs.question: Do you handle health department paperwork and permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we take care of all required health department paperwork, code compliance documentation, and permit applications so you do not have to deal with the bureaucracy. It is all included in our service.

testimonials.name: Sarah Azzara
testimonials.text: Awesome company. Super thorough and friendly, considerate pricing, and they take care of all the paperwork and code concerns for the health department.

testimonials.name: Ham Jones
testimonials.text: Terrell was courteous and efficient. After he was done, he smoothed out the soil on the lawn with his hands and left my property as clean as he found it.

testimonials.name: Denise Lavery
testimonials.text: I have only had the best experience with everyone at ClearRiver Environmental and continue with their excellent services.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your situation and a licensed technician will reach out within the hour to schedule your visit.
benefits: Free on-site inspection and written estimate
All health department paperwork handled for you

footer.description: Clear River Environmental Service Corp has been Long Island's trusted partner for plumbing, septic, cesspool, and environmental remediation services since 1950. Family-owned and operated with 76 years of proven expertise.
footer.service_area: Serving Suffolk County, Nassau County, Bohemia, Ronkonkoma, Islip, Smithtown, Huntington, and all of Long Island, NY
